arts.ttl: Tottenham need to do more to turn player’s head – Not giving any signs he wants transfer
arts.sum: Over the last few weeks, Tottenham have emerged as a candidate to land Fiorentina’s Moise Kean. The likes of Arsenal and Newcastle United have also been linked with the striker, who scored his 16th Serie A goal of the season against Atalanta at the weekend. La Nazione, as relayed by Calciomercato, have provided an update The post Tottenham need to do more to turn player’s head – Not giving any signs he wants transfer appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues 'eyeing summer move' for in-form Ligue 1 striker
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly showing an interest in signing Netherlands Under-21 international Emanuel Emegha from sister club Strasbourg.

arts.ttl: How Joao Felix became football's £171MILLION misfit: Berated by his own team-mates in latest miserable loan spell, unwanted by Chelsea after shock return and struggles in Spain
arts.sum: Joao Felix was once touted as football's biggest prospect. After bursting onto the scene in Portugal, it wasn't long before comparisons with Cristiano Ronaldo were made.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca issues withering putdown of Jadon Sancho form
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has refused to discuss whether Jadon Sancho will be a Chelsea player next season or not, but admitted the winger has not been good enough this season.
